languages.text: Мы были быстрее самой смерти, отбиваясь от творений чужаков и одновременно пытаясь удержаться на платформах, взлетающих к Музеону. Плазменные выстрелы прожигали грубые дыры в металлических телах противников, но врагов было слишком много. Лишь немногие избежали героической гибели под натиском некронов.
languages.translation_comment: Успешный чек Атлетики. Скрытность +1. Больше уцелевших зарковчан у Себериана в следующей сцене. Архимилитант жив.
Успешный чек Атлетики. Скрытность +1. Больше уцелевших зарковчан у Себериана в следующей сцене. Архимилитант жив.

languages.text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.
languages.original_text: Мы были быстрее самой смерти, отбиваясь от творений чужаков и одновременно пытаясь удержаться на платформах, взлетающих к Музеону. Плазменные выстрелы прожигали грубые дыры в металлических телах противников, но врагов было слишком много. Лишь немногие избежали героической гибели под натиском некронов.

Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

languages.text: Éramos más rápidos que la misma muerte, rechazando las creaciones alienígenas mientras intentábamos permanecer en las plataformas que subían por el Museion. Los disparos de plasma dejaron agujeros irregulares en los cuerpos metálicos de nuestros enemigos, pero nos superaban en número. Solo unos pocos escapamos a una muerte heroica contra los Necrones.
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: Éramos más rápidos que la misma muerte, rechazando las creaciones alienígenas mientras intentábamos permanecer en las plataformas que subían por el Museion. Los disparos de plasma dejaron agujeros irregulares en los cuerpos metálicos de nuestros enemigos, pero nos superaban en número. Solo unos pocos escapamos a una muerte heroica contra los Necrones.

languages.text: Dans l'espoir de distancer la mort elle-même, nous repoussâmes les créatures extraterrestres tout en essayant de rester en équilibre sur les plateformes qui s'élevaient vers le Muséion. Nos tirs de plasma avaient beau transpercer les corps métalliques de nos ennemis, le désespoir nous gagnait tant leur supériorité numérique était écrasante. Rares sont ceux qui échappèrent à une mort héroïque face à l'assaut impitoyable des Nécrons.
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: Dans l'espoir de distancer la mort elle-même, nous repoussâmes les créatures extraterrestres tout en essayant de rester en équilibre sur les plateformes qui s'élevaient vers le Muséion. Nos tirs de plasma avaient beau transpercer les corps métalliques de nos ennemis, le désespoir nous gagnait tant leur supériorité numérique était écrasante. Rares sont ceux qui échappèrent à une mort héroïque face à l'assaut impitoyable des Nécrons.

languages.text: 我们一边与异形造物周旋，一边还得努力在那些升向陈列馆的浮台上站稳脚跟，始终快死亡一步。等离子射击在敌人的金属躯体上灼出参差不齐的孔洞。然而敌众我寡，我们毫无胜算。在太空死灵的猛攻之下，能逃过英勇战死这一结局的，只有寥寥数人。
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: 我们一边与异形造物周旋，一边还得努力在那些升向陈列馆的浮台上站稳脚跟，始终快死亡一步。等离子射击在敌人的金属躯体上灼出参差不齐的孔洞。然而敌众我寡，我们毫无胜算。在太空死灵的猛攻之下，能逃过英勇战死这一结局的，只有寥寥数人。

languages.text: Wir waren schneller als der Tod selbst und schlugen die außerirdischen Schöpfungen zurück, während wir versuchten, auf den Plattformen zu bleiben, die sich dem Museion näherten. Plasma brannte tiefe Löcher in die metallenen Leiber unserer Feinde, aber wir waren ihnen zahlenmäßig hoffnungslos unterlegen. Der Heldentod im Angesicht des Ansturms der Necrons war ein Schicksal, dem nur wenige entkamen.
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: Wir waren schneller als der Tod selbst und schlugen die außerirdischen Schöpfungen zurück, während wir versuchten, auf den Plattformen zu bleiben, die sich dem Museion näherten. Plasma brannte tiefe Löcher in die metallenen Leiber unserer Feinde, aber wir waren ihnen zahlenmäßig hoffnungslos unterlegen. Der Heldentod im Angesicht des Ansturms der Necrons war ein Schicksal, dem nur wenige entkamen.

languages.text: Museion'a doğru yükselen platformların üzerinde kalmaya çalışırken, uzaylı yaratıklarla savaşırken ölümün kendisinden bile daha hızlıydık. Plazma atışları, düşmanlarımızın metal gövdelerinde pürüzlü delikler açıyordu. Fakat sayıca umutsuzca azınlıktaydık. Nekron saldırısı altında kahramanca bir ölüm, sadece birkaç kişinin kaçabildiği bir kaderdi.
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: Museion'a doğru yükselen platformların üzerinde kalmaya çalışırken, uzaylı yaratıklarla savaşırken ölümün kendisinden bile daha hızlıydık. Plazma atışları, düşmanlarımızın metal gövdelerinde pürüzlü delikler açıyordu. Fakat sayıca umutsuzca azınlıktaydık. Nekron saldırısı altında kahramanca bir ölüm, sadece birkaç kişinin kaçabildiği bir kaderdi.

languages.text: 死をも凌駕する速さで、ミュゼイオンへと上昇するプラットフォームの上で、我々は異星生物の創造物と戦った。プラズマの弾丸は敵の金属の体に粗い穴を開けたが、我々は圧倒的な数の敵に立ち向かう。ネクロンの襲撃下で英雄的に命を落とす運命は、僅かな者しか免れなかった。
languages.original_text: We were faster than death itself as we fought back the alien creations while trying to stay on top of platforms that were soaring up toward the Museion. Plasma shots burned rough-edged holes in our foes' metal bodies, but we were hopelessly outnumbered. A heroic death under the Necron onslaught was a fate only a few escaped.

traits.locale_text: 死をも凌駕する速さで、ミュゼイオンへと上昇するプラットフォームの上で、我々は異星生物の創造物と戦った。プラズマの弾丸は敵の金属の体に粗い穴を開けたが、我々は圧倒的な数の敵に立ち向かう。ネクロンの襲撃下で英雄的に命を落とす運命は、僅かな者しか免れなかった。
